summary: Conservative plan for a live PR inventory shard. No canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five hydrated PRs remain open, have live updated_at values, are non-security-sensitive in the preflight artifact, and lack enough proof for close, merge, fix, or replacement actions under the job permissions.
